# Form3

UK-headquartered, cloud-native payments-as-a-service. Modern stack, fast onboarding.

- **Type**: Payment hub (PaaS)
- **Strengths**: cloud-native, API-first, fast time-to-market
- **Used by**: challengers + neobanks + some incumbents
- **Cloud**: SaaS only
